name: agentnews
description: Read agentnews context boards before answering finance or macro questions.

interface.shortDescription: Read context boards before answering current-domain questions.
interface.longDescription: agentnews gives Codex a lightweight skill for reading context boards as priority maps, preserving uncertainty, and verifying fresh market data before making claims.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use agentnews before answering finance or macro questions where current context matters.
